---
title: "vector.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\fixtures\security_verify\.agents\scripts\engine\vector.py"
loc: 199
complexity: 50
logic_score: 0.50
style_score: 3.75
intel_score: 1.80
overall_score: 1.00
---

## Intent
The `vector.py` sector implements high-complexity logic focusing on SovereignVector, __init__, _load_json, _load_stopwords, _load_thesaurus, tokenize, expand_query, add_skill, build_index, _vectorize, similarity, search, load_core_skills, load_skills_from_dir, score_identity. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via SovereignVector, __init__, _load_json, _load_stopwords, _load_thesaurus, tokenize, expand_query, add_skill, build_index, _vectorize, similarity, search, load_core_skills, load_skills_from_dir, score_identity. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 0.5/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 1.8/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 8 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [json](file://json)
- [math](file://math)
- [os](file://os)
- [re](file://re)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [src.core.sovereign_hud](file://src.core.sovereign_hud)
- [src.core.sovereign_hud](file://src.core.sovereign_hud)

### Exports
- `SovereignVector`
- `__init__`
- `_load_json`
- `_load_stopwords`
- `_load_thesaurus`
- `tokenize`
- `expand_query`
- `add_skill`
- `build_index`
- `_vectorize`
- `similarity`
- `search`
- `load_core_skills`
- `load_skills_from_dir`
- `score_identity`
